title: Rich Roasted Rice Sweet Canadian Rice Pilaf
description: Sweet, aerated, adventurous Canadian dish featuring rice-syrup-jocheong, miso-marinate, egg-free-friendly, served in a scallop shell.

ingredients.name: Syrup (rice syrups)
ingredients.notes: light corn syrup or sugar syrup

instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine-mesh strainer until the water runs clear, and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, combine the rice, water, and a pinch of salt. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce the heat to low, cover with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for 15 minutes.
While the rice cooks, mix the jocheong, miso paste, and grated ginger in a small bowl.
Once the rice is cooked, fluff it with a fork and transfer it to a large bowl.
Add the jocheong-miso mixture, scallions, honey, and melted coconut oil to the bowl with the rice. Mix until the rice is well coated.
Transfer the rice mixture to the preheated oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned and crispy.
To serve, place a portion of the roasted rice mixture in each scallop shell, and drizzle with a little syrup. Garnish with additional scallions if desired.
